original_hypothesis.title: BlackClaims recoverERC20 Can Drain Active Season Reward Tokens
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: BlackClaims.recoverERC20 allows the owner to withdraw the FULL balance of ANY token including the reward token (BLACK) during an active claiming season. There is no restriction preventing withdrawal of the reward token. This directly violates the solvency invariant INV-ECON-006 since remaining_reward_amount could exceed the actual contract balance after recovery, making legitimate claims revert.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The function `IERC20(tokenAddress_).transfer(msg.sender, _balance)` sends the entire balance to the owner. If tokenAddress_ is the reward token (BLACK) and a season is active with unclaimed rewards, all subsequent claimAndStakeReward calls will fail due to insufficient balance. Unlike emergencyRecoverERC20 in Bribes which has an explicit warning comment, BlackClaims has no safeguard.

proof_of_signal.pattern: recoverERC20 transfers full balance with no check against remaining_reward_amount; token address not restricted from reward token

preconditions: Owner (or secondOwner) calls recoverERC20 with reward token address
Active season with remaining unclaimed rewards
Owner acts maliciously or makes an error

initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Owner drains reward token balance; _preClaim subtraction _season.remaining_reward_amount -= _reward underflows or transfer fails
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Owner extracts all season rewards; users cannot claim

economic_questions: Is there an operational scenario where this is called legitimately on the reward token?
What is the total season reward pool size?
Can affected users recover through revokeUnclaimedReward?
validation_requirements: Verify recoverERC20 has no token address filter
Test claimAndStakeReward after recoverERC20 drains reward token
Check if remaining_reward_amount tracking catches the inconsistency

market_conditions_analysis.optimal_timing: During active claiming season with maximum unclaimed rewards
market_conditions_analysis.market_impact_assessment: Complete loss of season rewards for all claimants

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Test recoverERC20 with reward token during active season

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
